森から娼館に戻ってくるころには、魔法植物はすっかり元に戻っていた。:
By the time we returned to the Brothel from the forest, the magical
plant had completely recovered.
あ～、元に戻っちまったな。<br>けっこう気分良かったのによぉ。: Ahh, back to normal now. I was feeling really good, though.
魔法植物は残念そうだ。<br>すっかり楽しんでいたらしい。:
The magical plant looked disappointed. It seemed to have been
thoroughly enjoying itself.
実はルディアに聞いたんだが、<br>娼館の前で咲いていたあの花は、大穴の中で発見:
Actually, I heard from Ludia that the flower blooming in front of the
Brothel was an 'alien object' discovered in the Abyss.
つまり、別の世界から転移されてきた植物ってことだ。<br>だから、植物に詳しいお:
In other words, it's a plant from another world, so no wonder you
didn't recognize it, even with your plant knowledge.
そっか……。だから初めて見るお花だったんだ。<br>すごく、綺麗なお花で、びっく:
I see... So that's why it was a flower I'd never seen before. It was so
beautiful, I was surprised.
マニョリアは異世界から転移されてきた植物に興味津々の様子だ。:
Magnolia seemed fascinated by the plant transported from another
world.
しかし、ルディアのヤツ、なんであんな危ない花を庭で育ててたんだろうな。<br>ま:
But why would that Ludia grow such a dangerous flower in the
garden? Could she be planning something with that pollen? Hmm...
いいか？ あの危ない花には２度と近付くんじゃないぞ！<br>特に、その魔法植物を:
Got it? Don't ever go near that dangerous flower again! And above
all, never let that magical plant anywhere near it.
念のため釘をさしておく。<br>すると、マニョリアはヒョコヒョコと体をすり寄せて:
Just to be safe, I drove the point home. Then, Magnolia bobbed close
and snuggled up to me.
ううん……あのお花、全然危なくなんてないよ……: No... that flower isn't dangerous at all...
は？ 何言ってるんだ？<br>お前、さっきあんなに危ない目に……: Huh? What are you saying? You were in such danger earlier...
だって、すごく気持ち良かったから……<br>おにいさんも……マックンも……: Because it felt so good... Big Brother... and Makkun...
……また、みんなでしよう……ね？: ...let's all do it again together... okay?
マニョリアの目は本気のようだ。<br>どうやらあの花粉によるプレイを随分と気に入:
Magnolia's eyes were serious. Apparently, she had really taken a
liking to that pollen play.
